description_long: This is a medium-sized, irregularly shaped sedimentary rock with distinct horizontal stratification and layered textures. The rock features a rugged, jagged profile with pronounced ledges and overhangs, giving it a weathered and natural appearance. Its coloration ranges from light gray and off-white to earthy browns, with some darker patches suggesting mineral deposits or exposure to the elements. The surface is rough and uneven, with visible crevices and fissures running along the layers. The rock appears solid and dense, with no visible cavities or openings. Such a rock could serve as a natural barrier or decorative element in an urban park or landscaped area.
description: A layered, jagged sedimentary rock with rough, striated surfaces in gray, white, and brown tones. Its rugged form and pronounced ledges give it a weathered, natural look.
description_view_0: The rock's broadest face is visible, showing prominent horizontal layers and a rugged, stepped profile.
description_view_1: A narrow side view highlights the rock's thin, vertical profile and the sharpness of its stratified edges.
description_view_2: The opposite broad face reveals more pronounced color variation and deeper crevices within the layers.
description_view_3: Another narrow side view, this time showing a more uniform brown coloration and less pronounced layering.
attribute_location: urban park or landscaped public space
